meaning: n.生肉,擦伤处,身上的痛处adj.未加工的,生疏的,处于自然状态的,,不掺水的,擦掉皮的,阴冷的,刺痛的vt.擦伤
examples: Exploitable raw materials were in short supply.
Raw materials were carried to the works by barge.
We cannot guarantee adequate supplies of raw materials.
The expectation of increased spending on roads and railways has helped to lift raw-material prices.
The raw output of those sequencing machines is a chaotic pile of gene fragments.
